title: feat(app): filter unavailable tools in system tool selector
known_problem: Targeted tests can pass while projects/app build catches missing shared/global type updates; app build is required.

commands.name: toolchain
commands.shell: node --version && npm --version && pnpm --version && git --version && rg --version | head -1

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files before package tests and app build.

commands.name: test_packages_global
commands.reason: Cover changed global tool types and enums.

commands.name: test_projects_app
commands.reason: Run only the PR-related API test, not the full app test suite.

commands.name: build_projects_app
commands.reason: Real failure gate from the captured run; missing shared/global type updates must fail here.
